title: What is Noise?
definition: Random information that obscures the stuff you care about

analogy.explanation: random sounds that obscure you're trying to hear. In the same way, image or data noise is random information that hides the real signal.

examples.label: Audio Noise
examples.description: Random variations overlaid on a sound wave

examples.label: Image Noise
examples.description: Random pixel values overlaid on an image
